creator: frank@altpeter.de
text:
Hi FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org,


Please cancel this pr, the port doesn't build with every combination of
knobs (at least yahoo doesn't compile).


on 2008-04-29 at 10:20:04 CEST, you wrote:
> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/123199'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
